{{CargoRelic
|name=Hinderson's Letter
|class_id=22120
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=02-21
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Feb 21, 2005 AD, Pobby Hinderson founded the religion of FNM in his open letter.<br>Pobby Hinderson wrote this open letter to the Board of Education originally as a satirical response to creationism being taught in Murika. He borrowed from theories of religion and created a parody religion, FNM. It states that the world was created by a drunk flying noodle monster that can neither be seen nor perceived. The only evidence for the existence of these theories lies in the faith of the believers.
|fame=74
|art=39
|fth=36
|civ=42
|tech=52
|ss1=Mutant Minion ATK +3%<br>Mutant Minion HARD Stats +0.9%
|ss2=Mutant Minion ATK +4%<br>Mutant Minion HARD Stats +1.2%
|ss3=Mutant Minion ATK +5%<br>Mutant Minion HARD Stats +1.5%
|ss4=Mutant Minion ATK +7%<br>Mutant Minion HARD Stats +2.1%
|ss5=Mutant Minion ATK +9%<br>Mutant Minion HARD Stats +2.7%
|ss7=Mutant Minion ATK +9%<br>Mutant Minion HARD Stats +2.7%<br>Mutant Minion HARD Stats +2.1% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Goldfish skill II.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion RUSH +4.5%
|skill2=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's FAME +10
}}
